markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Create a standardized playbook for replying to inbound marketing leads.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Reply Playbook:** A playbook was created to standardize replies to inbound leads, ensuring consistent messaging and strategic follow-up offers.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Segmented Offers:** Replies are now customized based on a prospect's company tier (1–3) and persona (Exec, Operator), with offers ranging from free resources to high-touch strategy sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**AEO Strategy Session:** A new free session was introduced to map AI visibility opportunities. It serves as a key funnel stage, routing qualified leads to sales (Tyler) and others to the free Check That tool.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Implementation:** The playbook is live in Notion. Jesus will use it to generate replies and will receive instructions for using the Cursor AI tool, which was identified as a more powerful alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=5077.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inconsistent Lead Replies

  - [Inconsistent replies to inbound leads across multiple channels (email, LinkedIn) create a fragmented prospect experience.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [The goal is to build a "decision tree" to guide replies, ensuring every interaction is strategic and moves prospects toward a sales conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### The Solution: A Standardized Reply Playbook

  - [**Core Principle:** Always provide value and surface a relevant offer in the first reply.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [**Reply Scenarios:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3399.0)
      - [**Direct Demo Request:** Route immediately to sales (Tyler).](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3399.0)
      - [**Proxy Attendee:** Forward the request and CC sales (Tyler).](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3396.0)
      - [**All Other Replies:** Use the playbook's segmented offers.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3493.0)

### Playbook Framework: Tiers & Personas

  - [**Company Tiers:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Tier 1:** Ideal customer profile (ICP).](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
          - [*Criteria:* Funded, $5M+ revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Tier 2:** Potential customer, but higher churn risk.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
          - *Criteria:* Seed/Series A, \<5k organic traffic.
      - [**Tier 3:** Unlikely to become a customer.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [**Personas:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
      - [**Senior Exec/Leader:** Founder, CEO, CMO, VP/Director of Growth.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
      - [**Marketing/Growth Operator:** SEO Manager, Content Strategist, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
      - [**Other:** Any role outside the above.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)

### Playbook Framework: Offers

  - [**High-Touch Offers (for Tier 1/2 Execs):**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**AEO Strategy Session:** A new free session to map AI visibility opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
          - [*Purpose:* Qualify leads → route to sales (Tyler) or the free Check That tool.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3257.0)
      - [**Exclusive Events:** Dinners, breakfasts, virtual wine tastings.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [**Low-Touch Offers (for Operators & Tier 3):**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [**Resources:** AI Growth Vault, workshop recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**Product:** Free Check That tool.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

### Playbook Implementation

  - [**Tooling:** The playbook is live in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=5077.0)
  - [**AI Assistant:** Cursor was identified as a more powerful AI tool than Notion's built-in assistant.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=5250.0)
  - [**Future Automation:** A Clay workflow will be built to automatically categorize inbound leads by tier and persona, streamlining the reply process.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesus:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3904.0)
      - [Use the Notion playbook to generate replies for inbound leads.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3904.0)
      - [Install GitHub Desktop and await setup instructions for Cursor.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=4090.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3508.0)
      - [Provide Jesus with instructions for setting up Cursor and accessing the GitHub repo.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=4136.0)
      - [Create a separate reply playbook for the "closed-lost" and "lookalike" campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/9uQrWFukqz7KDmN1CLuAxHAkWfD_2bbE?tab=summary&timestamp=3543.0)
